programmes.show_description: Four satirical tales of hapless men - who should know better - getting into extra-marital affairs. Reflects early 70s attitudes and contains sexual scenes.
Kevin McNally stars as Porthos, one of the Three Musketeers, in this award-winning short drama.
A young couple journey to Swinging London in search of fame and fortune. But with work scarce, they get drawn into the seedy world of modelling and sex work.
Exploring the working lives of musicians working in London's West End from 1950s Soho, jazz clubs and theatre up to the present day.

22/35. Charlie and Lee are in Kettering to design a practical garden for Bridget that stirs childhood memories of her home in Ireland.
11/35. Charlie and Chris face one of their biggest challenges ever in Witney as they try to transform a steep and shaded garden into a woodland-inspired vision.
1/12. Robert's cattle are pregnant in the Cairngorms, the MacDonalds test out their potato harvester in North Uist, and Nikki and Ollie's cow goes into labour.
2/12. The Barclays find their feet with their new Fat Lamb business. Rachel and Camy head to Lairg to buy more ewes. Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant.
3/12. In North Uist, the Highland cattle are moved to a tidal island, and pregnancy is scanned. It's showtime for Camy and Rachel. Jenni expands her animal menagerie.
4/12. Fraser and Carianne head to the mainland to buy new tups. The Barclays prepare their sheep for the Lanark Winter Show, Nikki and Ollie try their hand at farming rabbits.
British boxing comedy. Following his trainer's sudden death, Doug inherits a crumbling gym, packed full of crazy would-be fighters. Stars Brad Moore and Denise Van Outen.

12/35. Charlie and Chris are in Doncaster to revive Kirsty and Daniel's neglected garden and give it an earthy-hued, country cottage-style transformation.
A pair of frustrated housewives who are bored and neglected by their husbands decide to go to a sex clinic in the country. Contains nudity.

programmes.show_name: Secrets of a Door to Door Salesman
programmes.show_description: A young man gets a job as a vacuum salesman but finds that he has to fight off the advances of prospective female customers. Contains sex and nudity.
Solomon Watkins' quirky take as he interviews Michael, owner of the world's most unique collection of Really Thick Glasses. Funded and supported by Together TV and Cat Flap Media.
British boxing comedy. Following his trainer's sudden death, Doug inherits a crumbling gym, packed full of crazy would-be fighters. Stars Brad Moore and Denise Van Outen.
The frank story of eight people's tempestuous relationship with alcohol - from first drink to rock bottom, we see what it took to get sober and build a new life in recovery.
